seoTitle: Argenton vs Argoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Argenton and Argoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Argenton and Argoon.
heading: Argenton vs Argoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Argenton, New South Wales and Argoon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Argoon has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Argenton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Argenton or Argoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Argenton has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Argoon scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Argenton scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Argoon scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Argenton or Argoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Argoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
